contributor_summaries.sshumakov: Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll; Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.so

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 carried Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.so; Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll; Linux ARM64 crash: add fontconfig runtime library to cross-compile sysroot; AoT crash when IlcDisableReflection=true; libwebp to 1.6.0; skia submodule to point to squashed commit; brotli to 1.2.0; unused deps and add deps docs; libpng to 1.6.54; API guidelines and implement-issue skill.
